texto: It was clear that most of my insecurities originated from my need to have things be “perfect.” I wasn’t sure what bothered me more
autor: the fact that I had no control over the changes of my body and hair or that this horrible situation was only happening to me.
explicacao: Citação de the fact that I had no control over the changes of my body and hair or that this horrible situation was only happening to me. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “It was clear that most of my insecurities originated from my need to have things be “perfect.” I …” articula reflexao, tracey-berkowitz, not-my-buddy em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como not-my-buddy.
